purpose: Machine-readable dispatch contract for process-research. Hooks read this as fallback ground truth when transcript classification is missing or truncated (H11 audit finding 2026-04-18). Prose contract in SKILL.md remains canonical; this file mirrors it for enforcement.

mandatory_dispatches.name: report-generator
mandatory_dispatches.notes: Terminal writer for final report. Step 5 in process-research.

conditional_dispatches.name: research-synthesizer
conditional_dispatches.notes: Mandatory if multiple researchers contributed. Skipped if single-agent research.

conditional_dispatches.name: research-analyst
conditional_dispatches.condition: web sources / trends / market data / multi-source synthesis

conditional_dispatches.name: technical-researcher
conditional_dispatches.condition: code repos / technical docs / API behavior / implementation

notes: Research entry-point rule: only process-research may dispatch downstream researchers. Main session MUST NOT bypass by dispatching technical-researcher/research-analyst/research-orchestrator directly.
